rationale: Brand-owned press release (Kering Japan); per rubric, brand-owned promo copy is neutral — self-praise is not public opinion.

Third-party (Esquire Korea) factual product-campaign description; no evaluative praise or criticism, plain reporting of SS26 eyewear imagery and availability.
Factual trade-press item (Supple.kr/MoneyToday) reporting Korea-exclusive optical collection SKUs and distribution; no sentiment language, plain product announcement.
Luxury Daily (T1) reports Asia-Pacific retail down 4% with Gucci cited as group drag; mild negative — mixed article (jewelry positive) but Gucci-specific signal is negative.

Jing Daily (T1) frames 2026 as 'reset year' with Kering 'steadying'; Gucci repositioning effort cited neutrally — cautiously optimistic but rooted in prior decline; insufficient clarity for +1, per 'when in doubt, neutral' rule.
Third-party (nss magazine) reports Gucci 'reduced losses' in Q1 amid China luxury comeback; mild positive improvement signal from independent press in a positive sector context.

Brand-owned content (Gucci official Threads post); per rubric, brand-owned promo copy is neutral — self-promotional ambassador activation post.
